explanation: The user wants to retrieve a tomato from the microwave. According to the state, tomato_1 is currently on top of the microwave_0, and the microwave is currently toggled (on). To retrieve it, I first need to open the microwave. Once it is open, I can pick up the tomato. The robot is not currently holding any object, so this action is valid. The plan follows the logical sequence of opening the microwave and then picking up the tomato.
